description_long: This object is a modern, box-shaped record player with a sleek, dark exterior finish. The lid is hinged at the back and is shown in an open position, revealing the interior compartment where the turntable platter and controls are located. The front face features two large, rectangular speaker grilles with a mesh texture, suggesting built-in audio output. The top interior section includes a control panel with visible dials and switches, as well as a recessed area for the turntable mechanism. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a matte black or dark wood appearance. The object appears sturdy and is likely constructed from wood or engineered wood, with metal and plastic components for the internal mechanisms.
description: A sleek, boxy record player with a hinged lid, dark matte finish, and prominent front speaker grilles. The interior reveals a turntable and control panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, rectangular profile and the open lid, with no visible controls or speaker grilles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two large speaker grilles and the open lid, revealing the control panel and turntable area inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the open lid and plain side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned back panel with the lid open, no visible controls or grilles.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is partially visible inside the open compartment, appearing as a circular, flat surface recessed into the top section. It is medium-sized relative to the overall box, likely made of metal or plastic, and has a dark finish with a smooth texture. No grooves or decorative patterns are visible from the current views.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is visible inside the open compartment, positioned to the right of the platter. It is slender, metallic, and has a matte or brushed finish. The tonearm appears to be resting in its holder, not extended over the platter, and includes visible joints for movement.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several control knobs and switches located on the right side of the interior control panel. They are small, round, and metallic with a gold or brass finish. Some buttons and switches are also present, but no detailed labels or markings are visible.
attribute_dust_cover: A solid, opaque dust cover is present, made of wood or a similar material, finished in the same dark color as the rest of the record player. It is hinged at the back and shown in the open position. The cover is not transparent and does not have visible handles.
